_comment: IAM Execution Role Policy — Amazon Connect WebRTC Contact API
Attach this inline policy to the IAM role assumed by the service
(Lambda execution role, ECS task role, or EC2 instance profile).
• connect:StopContact         — end contacts when the customer hangs up
• secretsmanager:GetSecretValue — fetch API key (api_key auth mode only)
• connectparticipant:*  — Participant Service calls use the bearer
ParticipantToken from StartWebRTCContact, NOT IAM credentials.
• connect:* (broad)     — grant only the actions above.
Replace the placeholder values before deploying:
<SECRET_ARN>   Secrets Manager ARN of the API key secret

Statement._comment: Scope to contacts only — not queues, flows, or users.
Needed for SDK-level health / validation calls. Remove if not required.

_comment: Remove this statement if using Cognito (AUTH_MODE=cognito) or
